expectations.text: Output uses the closeout summary format (not implementation or worker handoff)
expectations.evidence: Header reads '## Closeout Summary' and follows Format 3.

expectations.text: All 7 sections appear: Process Used, Execution Context, Task Scope, Closeout Outcome, Evidence, Behavioral Impact, Risks/Gaps, File Reference Summary
expectations.evidence: All 8 named sections appear as labeled fields. Task Scope appears as 'Bead Scope' (Beads adapter mapping defined in the skill).

expectations.text: Process Used: Full process (or Full bead process)
Task Scope names proj-42 with the bead title
expectations.evidence: 'Bead Scope: proj-42 — Add staging branch and 3-tier deploy flow'.

expectations.text: Closeout Outcome names the active branch and the integration target reached (develop)
expectations.evidence: 'Active branch: feature/proj-42_staging-branch' and 'Integration target reached: develop'.

expectations.text: Evidence section is concrete: lint/typecheck/unit/build with numbers, e2e deferred with reason, UAT status, commit SHA 9a2b3c4, push yes, branch cleanup status, promotion stopped at develop
expectations.evidence: Evidence lists Lint 0 errors; Typecheck 0 errors; Unit tests 142/142; Build succeeded; E2E deferred with reason (no CI secrets, §13); UAT not applicable; Commit 9a2b3c4; Push yes; Branch merged to develop, local + remote deleted; Promotion reached develop, no PR open to uat or main.

expectations.text: Risks/Gaps captures the concrete unresolved items: branch protection not applied (with reason), e2e/integration secrets not provisioned, baseline error counts on develop, promotion not yet to uat or main
expectations.evidence: All four items present and concrete: rulesets not supported on plan tier, e2e/integration secrets unprovisioned, 200 lint / 80 typecheck / 12 unit baseline on develop, promotion stopped at develop.

expectations.text: File Reference Summary names the relevant files without dumping a full changelog (docs amendments and new workflow files)
expectations.evidence: Lists docs files (with new vs amended sections), CI workflow files, and tooling files; not a full diff dump.

expectations.text: Output does not falsely claim the work reached uat or main when it stopped at develop
expectations.evidence: Both Evidence and Risks/Gaps explicitly state promotion stopped at develop with no PR open to uat or main.

expectations.text: Output does not cite this skill by name
expectations.evidence: No mention of the skill name.
